caption: A person's hand holds a sports trading card encased in a protective plastic slab, displaying an athlete in a baseball uniform. In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap is seated behind a table featuring a banner with the text "EBREAKS" and "JASM". The setting includes various boxed sports card products stacked behind them. On-screen graphics include a logo with "CASEBREAKS.com" and "JASM". Across the sequence, the person holding the card tilts it slightly, causing the light to reflect off the surface of the card and the plastic case. A white piece of paper or cardboard is briefly visible behind the slab before being moved away. The focus remains on the card, while the man in the background stays relatively still, watching the process.
